scheme_name: National Overseas Scholarship for Students with Disabilities
implementing_agency: Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities (DEPwD)
description: A scholarship scheme to support students with disabilities in pursuing higher education abroad (Master’s and Ph.D. programmes) to help them achieve self-reliance and a dignified livelihood.
objective: To provide financial assistance to students with disabilities so they can pursue higher education abroad and overcome physical, financial, and social barriers.
target_beneficiaries: Students with other disabilities as defined under RPwD Act, 2016

benefits.air_passage: Economy class air fare from India to institution and back

eligibility.institution_requirement: University/Institution must be accredited by the authorized body of that country

exclusions: Bachelor’s degree courses are not covered
Candidates already studying or completed studies abroad through other scholarships are not eligible
More than two children with disabilities from the same parents are not eligible (except twins)
Scholarship is not available for repeating a class
Cannot hold another scholarship or stipend simultaneously

steps: Download the application form from the official website
Send the form along with required documents to the specified address
application_process.application_address: Under Secretary (Scholarships), Department of Empowerment of Persons with Disabilities, Room No. 516, Pt. Deendayal Antyodaya Bhawan, CGO Complex, Lodhi Road, New Delhi – 110003

documents_required: Self-attested declaration of no other scholarship
